title: Raise coverage for repo_context/tool_router/commit_manager
summary: Add focused unit tests to increase coverage for repo_context.py, tool_router.py, and commit_manager.py while asserting key behaviors and edge cases.
acceptance_criteria: Coverage for repo_context.py increases with new tests for core behaviors and error paths.
Coverage for tool_router.py increases with new tests for routing decisions and failure handling.
Coverage for commit_manager.py increases with new tests for commit flow decisions and error handling.

steps.description: Identify untested branches in repo_context.py and add minimal, deterministic unit tests.
Add routing and error-handling tests for tool_router.py covering key branches.
Add commit flow tests for commit_manager.py covering success and failure scenarios.
Run coverage to confirm target files show improved coverage.

notes: Prefer minimal, deterministic tests with clear assertions.
Use existing fixtures and avoid network or filesystem dependencies where possible.
